programme.title: Ghost Loop
programme.desc: 9Mystery & Paranormal provides supernatural documentaries, unexplained phenomena, and mystery-focused entertainment programming.

programme.title: Theresa Caputo: Raising Spirits
programme.desc: (M) Psychic medium Theresa Caputo is back and going global with her incredible gift of communicating with the dead. Before heading on tour she receives a surprise from her clients.

programme.title: History'S Greatest Mysteries
programme.sub-title: The Escape of John Wilkes Booth
